You felt empathy. We've all used these tones through our entire life. I'm talking in the beginning in those first few seconds, show up enthusiastic and expert in your field. It's tonality and body language. And this together, these two things, tonality and body language, make up about 90% of human communication. 90% of human communication. Tonality is about 45%. This is 45%. And the words are 10%. That's it. The words. Only 10% of communication.
